events.title: First responders exposed to fentanyl in deadly New Mexico incident, officials say
events.summary: First responders were exposed to fentanyl and sickened after arriving at a rural New Mexico home earlier this week to investigate a possible overdose that left three people dead, officials said Friday.

events.title: Trump praises vulnerable GOP Rep. Mike Lawler as ‘fantastic’ during a rally in New York
events.summary: President Donald Trump defended his economic record and praised Republican Rep. Mike Lawler, who is seeking re-election in a very competitive New York district.

events.title: As Trump flexes his muscle on the campaign trail, he faces rare setbacks on Capitol Hill: From the Politics Desk
events.summary: President Donald Trump has reinforced his sway with Republican primary voters. But that success has not translated to the halls of the Capitol.

events.title: No child deaths definitively linked to covid shots, FDA says
events.summary: No child deaths have been definitively linked to Covid vaccines, according to a report from the Food and Drug Administration that was quietly made public last week.

events.title: Judge dismisses charges against Kilmar Abrego Garcia in human trafficking case
events.summary: A federal judge in Tennessee dismissed the criminal charges against Kilmar Abrego Garcia on Friday, finding that the investigation into his alleged involvement with human trafficking was “tainted.”

events.title: Police urge witnesses to come forward in former Prince Andrew investigation
events.summary: British police urged witnesses to come forward on Friday as they continued to investigate potential offenses by former Prince Andrew related to Jeffrey Epstein.

events.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
events.summary: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

events.title: Map: See how gas prices have changed in the county where you live
events.summary: How much gas prices have increased during the Iran war depends entirely on where you live, an NBC News analysis of average gas price data from AAA shows.

events.title: House Republicans cancel vote curbing Trump on Iran
events.summary: House Republicans delayed a vote on a war powers resolution that would restrict President Donald Trump’s ability to continue U.S. military operations in Iran.

events.title: Iran-U.S. diplomacy intensifies as Trump seeks ‘right answers,’ Tehran signals gaps ‘reduced’
events.summary: A new burst of diplomatic action intensified Thursday in a push to break the deadlock between the United States and Iran.

events.title: Greenlanders protest against Trump as the U.S. opens new consulate
events.summary: Hundreds gathered at the new U.S. consulate in Greenland to protest President Trump’s ambition for greater influence in the Danish territory. In January, the White House said Trump was considering how to acquire Greenland, saying it was strategically vital for security in the Arctic.

events.title: Ebola treatment center set alight in Congo
events.summary: An Ebola treatment center in the Democratic Republic of Congo was set alight as a group tried to retrieve the body of a person who died of the virus. The treatment center was not operational but was used to store bodies before a proper burial, an important step in containing Ebola outbreaks.

events.title: Gaza flotilla activists allege abuse in Israeli detention
events.summary: Activists from the Global Sumud Flotilla, whose boats were intercepted in international waters by Israeli forces, claim they were beaten and mistreated while detained.

events.title: U.S. Embassy in India rolls out “Happy Birthday America” rickshaws
events.summary: Rickshaws bearing a large image of President Trump with the slogan “Happy Birthday America!” have been popping up across New Delhi in recent weeks. The unusual advertising campaign was rolled out by Sergio Gor, the U.S. ambassador to India, as a part of a broader push to mark America250 in several countries.

events.title: Absence of USAID likely slowed Ebola detection and response, former officials say
events.summary: The Trump administration hollowed out USAID last year, but the State Department denied the changes have hampered its response.

events.title: How the Middle East conflict is worsening Somalia’s slide into famine
events.summary: Mustafe Denbil runs an agricultural shop and farm in northern Somalia, but three months after he ordered fertilizer and pesticides, the supplies his business needs are still stranded in Dubai

events.title: Misinfo, strained resources and armed conflict hamper Ebola response
events.summary: One of the first cases of Ebola that Rose Tchwenko heard about in the current outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo was in a healthcare worker.

events.title: Mamdani announces $50 World Cup ticket lottery for New York City residents
events.summary: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani said Thursday that the city will use a lottery system to distribute 1,000 World Cup tickets at $50 apiece to residents of the five boroughs

events.title: Gaza flotilla activists deported from Israel as outrage over treatment grows
events.summary: Gaza flotilla activists who were detained by Israel and later pinned to the ground to the taunts of Israel’s far-right national security minister have been released from prison and will be deported to Turkey on Thursday, officials said.

events.title: Trump says he will hold protocol-shattering call with Taiwan leader
events.summary: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te would be “happy” to speak with President Donald Trump, the Beijing-claimed island’s foreign ministry said Thursday, after Trump suggested the two leaders might talk in what would be a major break in U.S. presidential protocol that is likely to antagonize China.

events.title: Raúl Castro indictment brings back history of Cuba’s downing of U.S. civilian planes
events.summary: Cuba shot down two Brothers to the Rescue U.S. civilian planes in 1996, killing four Cuban Americans and drawing swift condemnation from the U.S. and the international community.

events.title: Ebola death toll rises as two Americans are flown to Europe for monitoring
events.summary: The suspected death toll from the Ebola outbreak in central Africa rose again Wednesday as a group of potentially exposed Americans was arriving in Europe for monitoring and the World Health Organization warned a vaccine was still months away.

events.title: Putin and Xi say ties are at ‘unprecedented’ high at friendly summit after Trump visit
events.summary: China-Russia relations are at a “historic high,” Chinese leader Xi Jinping said as he met with Russian President Vladimir Putin in Beijing days after hosting U.S. President Donald Trump.

events.title: Could a soccer match help mend ties between North and South Korea?
events.summary: A North Korean women’s soccer team took the field Wednesday in South Korea, a rare cross-border clash as Kim Jong Un pursues a more hostile policy toward his neighbor.

events.title: Ebola deaths rise sharply as outbreak’s ‘scale and speed’ worry WHO chief
events.summary: The death toll from an Ebola outbreak in central Africa rose sharply Tuesday, with the head of the World Health Organization expressing concern over the “scale and speed of the epidemic.”At least 131 people are believed to have died and 531 suspected to have been infected, according to the Congolese Health Ministry.

events.title: Raúl Castro is expected to be indicted by the U.S., sources say
events.summary: A U.S. indictment of former Cuban president Raúl Castro is expected to be announced Wednesday in Miami, two federal sources familiar with the investigation told NBC News

events.title: Goodbye Trump, hello Putin: China’s Xi welcomes Russian leader facing pressure at home
events.summary: Vladimir Putin landed in China on Tuesday to a warm welcome from his “dear friend” President Xi Jinping, but he arrived with the heavy burden of a war he increasingly seems unable to win.

events.title: What you should know about the Ebola outbreak in 2026
events.summary: The Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo has grown to nearly 500 suspected cases and 116 deaths, the United Nations said Monday.

events.title: U.S. prosecutors drop fraud charges against billionaire Indian businessman
events.summary: The Justice Department said it would drop its criminal fraud charges against billionaire Indian businessman Gautam Adani, a significant reversal in a high-profile case.

events.title: U.S. issues travel bans as Ebola outbreak fuels global alarm
events.summary: An Ebola outbreak in central Africa, which the World Health Organization has declared a public health emergency of international concern, is sparking increasing global alarm
